zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Knightley於1416年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾卻斯特頓時，她的父親Sir John Knightley47歲，母親Joan de Thornbury41歲。她和Sir Henricus Aben至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1457年在她的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾卻斯特頓。

nameMeanings.name: Knightley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knightly
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of Knightley, a habitational name from Knightley in Gnosall (Staffordshire). The placename derives from Old English cniht ‘knight, young man, retainer’ (genitive plural cnihta) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This is the usual spelling of the name in Ireland, where it has been establishes since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Knightley was born in 1416, in Chesterton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Knightley, was 47 and her mother, Joan de Thornbury, was 41. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Sir Henricus Aben. She died in 1457, in her hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in Chesterton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Knightley est née en 1416, à Chesterton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Knightley, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Joan de Thornbury, avait 41 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Henricus Aben. Elle est décédée en 1457, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Chesterton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Knightley 1416 in Chesterton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Knightley 47 und ihre Mutter Joan de Thornbury 41. Sie hatte mit Sir Henricus Aben mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1457 im Alter von 41 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Chesterton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Knightley è nata il nel 1416 nel Chesterton, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Knightley, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Joan de Thornbury, aveva 41 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Sir Henricus Aben. Morì nel 1457, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Chesterton, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Knightley(이)가 1416년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 체스터턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Knightley(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Thornbury(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 Sir Henricus Aben(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1457년 그녀의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 체스터턴에 묻혔다.
